questions.question: The heights of 5 bookshelves in a library are $62, 65, 68, 70, 72$ inches. What is the stem in a stem-and-leaf plot for these heights?
A recipe for cake requires $23, 25, 27, 29, 31$ ounces of sugar. What is the leaf for the value $27$ in a stem-and-leaf plot?
The lengths of 5 wooden planks are $43, 45, 47, 49, 51$ inches. What is the median of these lengths when presented in a stem-and-leaf plot?
A chef has $15, 18, 20, 22, 25$ minutes to prepare meals. What is the range of these times in a stem-and-leaf plot?
The prices of 5 tools are $15.50, 16.25, 17.00, 17.75, 18.50$ dollars. What is the stem for the tool with price $17.00$ in a stem-and-leaf plot?
A builder measured the widths of 5 windows as $35.2, 36.5, 37.8, 39.1, 40.4$ inches. What is the leaf for the width $37.8$ in a stem-and-leaf plot?
The cooking times for 5 meals are $8.2, 9.5, 10.8, 12.1, 13.4$ minutes. What is the median of these times when presented in a stem-and-leaf plot?
A chef has a list of $5, 8, 12, 15, 18$ minutes to prepare meals. What is the mode of these times in a stem-and-leaf plot?
The lengths of 7 wires are $25, 27, 30, 32, 35, 37, 39$ inches. Create a stem-and-leaf plot to represent these lengths and find the median.
A recipe book has the following page numbers with recipes: $12, 18, 20, 25, 30, 32, 38$. Create a stem-and-leaf plot to represent these page numbers and find the range.

teacher_rules: Ensure students understand how to create stem-and-leaf plots
Emphasize the importance of correct stem and leaf identification
Allow students to use calculators for calculations, but not for creating stem-and-leaf plots
